concerns.text: FR-002 mandates 're-reference to average mastoids' but User Story 1 only specifies 'ICA-cleaned signals' and 'bandpass-filtered data'. The re-referencing step is not explicitly anchored to a user story acceptance scenario, creating a potential orphaned requirement detail.

FR-005 mentions 'Bonferroni correction for multiple comparisons across electrode sites' but does not explicitly mention the 'working memory capacity estimates' as the outcome variable in the correlation, though it is implied by 'alpha metrics and working memory capacity'. The phrasing is slightly ambiguous regarding the full scope of the correlation pair.
